# =============================================================================
# blacklist.txt - known-bad trackers (dead, malicious, or flooded).
#
# AUTO-GENERATED placeholder: this file is rebuilt on every run of the
# "Update Trackers" workflow from the URLs in config/blacklist_sources.txt
# (plus any entries already present here - the list is accumulative).
# This header will be replaced by real entries after the first run.
#
# Every tracker listed here is EXCLUDED from all_trackers.txt, udp.txt,
# http.txt, https.txt, and ws.txt. Do not edit manually.
# =============================================================================
